channel.title: Ghost Alpha Dossier — Daily Market Intelligence
channel.description: AI-powered daily market analysis with institutional-grade signals, momentum picks, and Sam's commentary. Generated by a 16-stage pipeline. Built by Michael. Roasted by Sam.

item.title: 🟡 Dossier 2026-05-22 — NORMAL · Gold: COST
item.description:
🟡 NORMAL · SPY ▲ 0.2% · VIX 16.9

The VIX at 16.

🥇 Gold Pick: COST — Score: 67/100 (A)

📡 175 scanner signals across 6 strategies

"If you can't explain your thesis in one sentence, you don't have a thesis — you have FOMO." — Sam
